# Offer Strength Proof

## Goal

Make the next step obviously worth trying.

## Offer strength variables

```text
value_clarity
risk_reversal
time_to_value
setup_effort
price_visibility
proof_before_commitment
urgency
specificity
```

## Offer score

```text
offer_score = value × ease × trust / risk
```

## Strong software offers

- no-credit-card sandbox,
- upload one file and see result,
- free diagnostic,
- migration check,
- interactive demo,
- ROI calculator,
- pilot with success criteria.
